mnemonics: Create a new directory structure by creating the following folders: src/main/java and src/main/res.
In src/main/java, create a new package for your activity and write your Java code in the .java files.
keyPoints: Chapter 3: Creating the Android User Interface
Key concept: Layouts are used to design the user interface of an Android application.
Key concept: There are two types of layouts: Linear Layout and Relative Layout.
Key concept: Use a user interface designer to design the layout of your application.
Key concept: The UI Designer tool allows you to create a user interface for your application without writing code.
